review_criteria: Verify that V0.7 is explicitly defined as a new version iteration, not a patch or amendment to V0.6.
Verify that the V0.6 carry-overs (State separation, Legacy tooling deprecation, SubAgent review automation) are explicitly imported into the V0.7 scope.
Verify that the three new core requirements (Multi-Agent Collaboration, Self-Evolution Loop, Environment Discovery) are explicitly included.
Verify that there is no scope shrinkage (all requirements from the kickoff directive are addressed).
Verify that 'governed autonomy' is NOT conflated with 'unconditional self-update' (self-modification must be reviewed).
Verify that 'low invasiveness' is NOT conflated with 'no protocol' (the protocol must remain physically verified).
Verify that 'environment adaptation' is NOT bound to a single toolchain (must support multiple AI Coding environments).
Verify that high-risk migrations (like moving to .agent-state/ or deleting legacy tools) are mapped as design/roadmaps in the kickoff, not executed.
